insight: On the proxy operator (`ProxyOperator`), `then discord <channel> <message>` is parsed into `discordMessages` but `executeOperators` never dispatches it — it's a silent no-op. Only backend `then discord` actually fires (via `Operator.java` iterating `getDiscordMessages()`). Similarly, `then proxy <server> <command>` on proxy operators routes to `Platform.dispatchConsoleCommand` (proxy console), not to the named backend.

No backend operator distinguishes a network join from a server switch — `PlayerJoinEvent` fires for both and no `require firstconnection`/`ignore switch` exists. The `switch` message type is proxy-only. `require playedbefore` only flags first-ever connection, not first-this-session.
